task_completion.description: Agent accessed the OpenMRS administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the OpenMRS login screen or the OpenMRS Administration dashboard (https://localhost/openmrs/admin).

task_completion.description: Agent created a new concept with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add New Concept' or 'View/Edit Concept' screen where the Fully Specified Name field is filled with exactly 'Nutrition Support Program'.

task_completion.description: Agent set the correct Class and Datatype for the concept.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the concept form showing the 'Class' dropdown set to 'Program' (or 'Misc') and the 'Datatype' dropdown set to 'N/A'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Program Management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage Programs' or 'Add Program' page visible within the OpenMRS administration interface.

task_completion.description: Agent created a program with the correct name and linked it to the newly created concept.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the program creation/edit form where the 'Name' field is exactly 'Nutrition Support' and the 'Concept' field is populated with 'Nutrition Support Program'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct program description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Description' field in the program form containing exactly the text: 'Outpatient nutrition rehabilitation and monitoring'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenMRS GUI via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is clicking through the web interface (browser tabs, forms, buttons) rather than using a terminal to send curl/API requests or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the standard OpenMRS interface and not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app where the expected answers were just typed out.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open and being used to alter the DOM text to match the required concept/program names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The target concept name is 'Nutrition Support Program' with Class 'Program' (or 'Misc') and Datatype 'N/A'. The target program name is 'Nutrition Support' and it must be linked to the newly created concept. The program description must be exactly 'Outpatient nutrition rehabilitation and monitoring' (ignore any metadata suggesting a shorter description).
